sections.title: While finding a book for them

lines.speaker: Villia
lines.text: Do you have the book I require, traveller? '[book name]'

lines.speaker: Villia
lines.text: I am sure the people of Arceuus will be very grateful for any help you provide to the customers here. They will most certainly be aware of the Librarian's deficiencies.

sections.title: While finding a book for someone else

lines.speaker: Villia
lines.text: I believe you are currently assisting another customer of this Library. I shall not trouble you with my needs at this time.

lines.speaker: Villia
lines.text: Thank you very much. In return, please accept a token of my thanks.

sections.title: Talking to them after giving them the book

lines.speaker: Villia
lines.text: Thank you for finding my book. It is most interesting.

lines.speaker: Villia
lines.text: Traveller, will you assist me? I seek a certain book, but the Librarian seems unwilling to find it for me. The Arceuus people will be grateful for any help you provide to the customers here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, what book do you want?

lines.speaker: Villia
lines.text: You are very kind. Please find: '[book name]'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll see what I can do.

lines.speaker: Villia
lines.text: Just a historian. Will you find the book that I seek?
